distribution_method: per-section word budget based on structural role

s00_opening.note: Tight. Get in, set the scene, get to the dog.

s01_brains_rgb.note: Room for the data and the VRGB introduction.

s02_dogs_computation.note: Longest evidence section. Needs space for the extrapolation flag.

s03_color_you_cant_see.note: Emotional density over word count. Every sentence earns its place.

s04_what_engineers_found.note: The convergence argument. Precise, not padded.

s05_mantis_shrimp_problem.note: Speculative peak gets the most space. Tradeoff matrix plus Hofstadter unit.

s06_what_im_building.note: The practical claim. Room for uncertainty and the ABITS reference.

s07_coda.note: Same budget as opening. Symmetry. The walk is a loop.
